commands.review_summary:
This PR updates the Policy plugin docs, state collection, doctor checks, and tests to add data-handling conformance signals and reject unsupported policy.jsonc sections or rule keys as policy/policy-jsonc-invalid.

PR surface: Source +1083, Tests +543, Docs +50. Total +1676 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The high-confidence path is to put an unknown section such as unknownPosture in policy.jsonc and run openclaw policy check --json; the PR source, tests, and posted terminal proof show policy/policy-jsonc-invalid after the patch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the compatibility/security-boundary change and stack ordering; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.
